tests.scenario: Validation of free trial terms display on sign-up page
steps: Navigate to the app's sign-up page
Tap on the 'Start Free Trial' button
tests.expected_result: The summary of free trial terms includes the duration and any charges that will be incurred after the trial period, and is clear and concise
tests.notes: Removed one of the steps since it was the same as the expected result

steps: Log in to the account
Navigate to account settings
Cancel subscription
tests.expected_result: The subscription is cancelled within 5 steps
tests.notes: Changed from 2 steps to 5 steps to match requirement

tests.scenario: Validate confirmation email sent after subscription cancellation
steps: Log in to the system with a registered user's credentials
Cancel the user's subscription
tests.notes: New requirements contains less implementation details so I changed the test to match that

tests.scenario: Validate meditation library content and updates
steps: Establish a stable internet connection
Access the meditation library
tests.expected_result: At least 500 meditation sessions are available
tests.notes: New requirements contains less implementation details so I changed the test to match that

steps: Prepare a device capable of playing high-quality audio
Select and play a meditation session
tests.expected_result: The audio plays with a minimum of 128 kbps bitrate
tests.notes: New requirements contains only 1 single metric so I changed the test to match that

steps: Log in to the system as a valid user
Navigate to the sleep story section
Select a single category'
tests.expected_result: The system displays a list of sleep stories that match the user'scategory

steps: Monitor the server/app uptime status
tests.expected_result: The app should have an uptime of 99.99%
tests.notes: New requirements is changed drastically to be about uptime so I changed the test to reflect that
